code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 97 or b == 101 or b == 105 or b == 111 or b == 117
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("vowels=#{count}")
when None
  println("vowels=0")
end
